channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: US House Approves $95 Billion Budget Plan With Iran War Funding

media:content.media:description: The measure was narrowly approved in a 216-214 vote and now heads to the Senate.

item.description: The US House of Representatives approved a $95 billion budget framework on Wednesday, with most of the funding earmarked for the Pentagon to fund the war against Iran.
item.content:encoded: The US House of Representatives approved a $95 billion budget framework on Wednesday, with most of the funding earmarked for the Pentagon to fund the war against Iran.

item.title: Iran-US War News Live Updates: US Strikes Iran For 12th Consecutive Night

media:content.media:description: Shipping through the Strait of Hormuz has largely stalled

item.description: US-Iran War News Live Updates: The US State Department has issued an alert urging American citizens around the world to "exercise increased caution" over the war with Iran. The alert said that "due to heightened tensions in the Middle East.
item.content:encoded: US-Iran War News Live Updates: The US State Department has issued an alert urging American citizens around the world to "exercise increased caution" over the war with Iran. The alert said that "due to heightened tensions in the Middle East.

item.title: US Launches Fresh Wave Of Strikes Against Iran's Military Infrastructure
item.description: The US military said Wednesday it had launched a fresh wave of strikes targeting Iranian military infrastructure, marking the twelfth night in a row it had attacked Iran.
item.content:encoded: The US military said Wednesday it had launched a fresh wave of strikes targeting Iranian military infrastructure, marking the twelfth night in a row it had attacked Iran.

item.title: US Announces Landmark Nuclear Deal With Saudi Arabia

media:content.media:description: US on Wednesday announced that it had reached a civilian nuclear cooperation deal with Saudi.

item.description: The United States on Wednesday announced that it had reached a civilian nuclear cooperation deal with Saudi Arabia.
item.content:encoded: The United States on Wednesday announced that it had reached a civilian nuclear cooperation deal with Saudi Arabia.

item.title: Terrorism Trial Opens In Stabbing Of Author Salman Rushdie

media:content.media:description: It's a second trial for Hadi Matar, who was found guilty in a New York state attempted murder case.

item.description: The man convicted of trying to kill Salman Rushdie spent years researching the writer's whereabouts before stabbing him on a lecture stage, federal prosecutors said Wednesday at the opening of his federal terrorism trial.
item.content:encoded: The man convicted of trying to kill Salman Rushdie spent years researching the writer's whereabouts before stabbing him on a lecture stage, federal prosecutors said Wednesday at the opening of his federal terrorism trial.

item.title: "Eye For An Eye": Iran Warns Of Forceful Response To US Strike

media:content.media:description: Abbas Araghchi said Wednesday that Iran would respond in kind to any attack on its infrastructure.

item.description: Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi said Wednesday that Iran would respond in kind to any attack on its infrastructure, after Washington threatened to bomb a bridge or power plant for every ship targeted in the Strait of Hormuz.
item.content:encoded: Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi said Wednesday that Iran would respond in kind to any attack on its infrastructure, after Washington threatened to bomb a bridge or power plant for every ship targeted in the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Iran Strikes On CIA Facilities Prompt Questions About Possible Russian Role
item.description: Iranian drone attacks on CIA facilities in the Gulf have prompted US intelligence analysts to investigate whether Russia assisted by providing targeting information or advanced drone technology, said four people familiar with US intelligence.
item.content:encoded: Iranian drone attacks on CIA facilities in the Gulf have prompted US intelligence analysts to investigate whether Russia assisted by providing targeting information or advanced drone technology, said four people familiar with US intelligence.

item.title: Trump's Saudi Nuclear Pact Opens Door To Uranium Enrichment. What's At Stake

media:content.media:description: The proposed agreement is expected to be sent to the US Congress soon

item.description: The agreement leaves out two safeguards Washington has traditionally insisted on. First, a ban on uranium enrichment and spent fuel reprocessing, along with an "additional protocol" that provides tougher international inspections.
item.content:encoded: The agreement leaves out two safeguards Washington has traditionally insisted on. First, a ban on uranium enrichment and spent fuel reprocessing, along with an "additional protocol" that provides tougher international inspections.

item.title: Elon Musk Promises 'True To Homer' AI Version Of Odyssey After Nolan's Release

media:content.media:description: Musk said the AI-generated film would be released before the end of the year

item.description: The billionaire said the AI-generated film would be released before the end of the year and would stay faithful to Homer's original work.
item.content:encoded: The billionaire said the AI-generated film would be released before the end of the year and would stay faithful to Homer's original work.

item.title: Prince George Turns 13 As He Prepares To Start At Eton College

media:content.media:description: As the eldest child of the heir to the British throne George is set to succeed his father as king one day

item.description: As the eldest child of the heir to the British throne, Prince William, and Princess Catherine, George is set to succeed his father as king one day.
item.content:encoded: As the eldest child of the heir to the British throne, Prince William, and Princess Catherine, George is set to succeed his father as king one day.

item.title: US Mother Convicted For Forcing 11-Year-Old Daughter To Give Birth To Husband's Baby

media:content.media:description: Cherie Dawn Walker found guilty of enabling child sexual abuse and neglect charges in Oklahoma.

item.description: Oklahoma woman convicted for enabling sexual abuse of her 11-year-old daughter who gave birth at home.
item.content:encoded: Oklahoma woman convicted for enabling sexual abuse of her 11-year-old daughter who gave birth at home.

item.title: US Expects "Positive" Visit From Chinese President Xi Jinping In September

media:content.media:description: The Chinese president's visit would follow a May trip to Beijing by Trump

item.description: While the visit has yet to be officially confirmed, Rubio made it clear the White House expected it to happen, as he emerged from a meeting with China's Foreign Minister Wang Yi on the sidelines of a summit of Southeast Asian leaders.
item.content:encoded: While the visit has yet to be officially confirmed, Rubio made it clear the White House expected it to happen, as he emerged from a meeting with China's Foreign Minister Wang Yi on the sidelines of a summit of Southeast Asian leaders.

item.title: Iran Denies Secret Nuclear Site At Pickaxe Mountain Amid US Strike Threat

media:content.media:description: The mountain is near Iran's Natanz nuclear facility, which was bombed by the US last year

item.description: Trump had warned on Tuesday that the US would hit the site, known as Pickaxe Mountain in English.
item.content:encoded: Trump had warned on Tuesday that the US would hit the site, known as Pickaxe Mountain in English.

item.title: German Approval Sparks Security Concerns Over French Russian Nuclear Project

media:content.media:description: The project would be based at Framatome's fuel rod assembly facility in the town of Lingen

item.description: The planned joint venture by a subsidiary of French company Framatome and Russia's state-owned nuclear power agency Rosatom is aimed at producing fuel rods used in Russian-designed reactors.
item.content:encoded: The planned joint venture by a subsidiary of French company Framatome and Russia's state-owned nuclear power agency Rosatom is aimed at producing fuel rods used in Russian-designed reactors.

item.title: US Will Bomb Bridges, Power Plants If Iran Shoots At Ships In Hormuz: Trump

media:content.media:description: A day earlier, Trump warned that the United States was "not finished" attacking Iran

item.description: Trump said that it does not matter if the attack is by a missile, rocket or drone; the United States will "bomb and destroy" a bridge or power plant near Iran's capital -- Tehran.
item.content:encoded: Trump said that it does not matter if the attack is by a missile, rocket or drone; the United States will "bomb and destroy" a bridge or power plant near Iran's capital -- Tehran.

item.title: Bulgaria Approves US Use Of Bezmer Air Base For Middle East Support

media:content.media:description: US military to use air base in Bulgaria to support US operations in the Middle East.

item.description: Up to eight US tanker aircraft and 250 personnel will be stationed at Bezmer Air Base from Friday to October without further approvals.
item.content:encoded: Up to eight US tanker aircraft and 250 personnel will be stationed at Bezmer Air Base from Friday to October without further approvals.

item.title: US-India Trade Deal Could Be Signed In 3-4 Months, US Official Says

media:content.media:description: The official said the agreement was nearly complete

item.description: Washington and New Delhi have been negotiating a bilateral trade agreement to expand market access and lower trade barriers as part of efforts to deepen economic ties.
item.content:encoded: Washington and New Delhi have been negotiating a bilateral trade agreement to expand market access and lower trade barriers as part of efforts to deepen economic ties.

item.title: US Plans To Announce Nuclear Agreement With Saudi Arabia Amid Iran Tensions

media:content.media:description: Trump administration said the agreement would provide billions of dollars for the US nuclear industry

item.description: The move comes as Washington fights a war with Iran that began in part over US concerns with Tehran's own nuclear program -- an issue that remains a key point of contention during now-stalled talks between the two foes.
item.content:encoded: The move comes as Washington fights a war with Iran that began in part over US concerns with Tehran's own nuclear program -- an issue that remains a key point of contention during now-stalled talks between the two foes.

item.title: Meta Lawsuit Shows That If AI Fires You, Proving It Is The Hard Part

media:content.media:description: A hearing is scheduled for August 24. (Representational)

item.description: Workers who claim to be targeted for layoffs because of disabilities or medical leave, often cannot muster the evidence of wrongdoing necessary to quickly secure a win in court.
item.content:encoded: Workers who claim to be targeted for layoffs because of disabilities or medical leave, often cannot muster the evidence of wrongdoing necessary to quickly secure a win in court.

item.title: 15 People Injured After Two Trams Collide On Rotterdam's Erasmus Bridge

media:content.media:description: The bridge has been closed to all traffic in both directions.

item.description: Bridge's webcam footage showed a tram steaming into the back of another, sending debris flying across the lanes of traffic and damaging both trams.
item.content:encoded: Bridge's webcam footage showed a tram steaming into the back of another, sending debris flying across the lanes of traffic and damaging both trams.
